children.title: Autonomous mode: auto-approve team plans
children.body:
## Parent

#103

Add a policy that flips planned -> approved without human input when autonomous_mode is true.

children.title: Autonomous mode: auto-decompose large issues
children.body:
## Parent

#103

When an incoming issue exceeds a token threshold, run the decomposition planner automatically.

children.title: Autonomous mode: Event Log audit entries
children.body:
## Parent

#103

Record every autonomous decision as a team.planned or issue.decomposed event in the Event Log.
